attacks.name: Precocious Evolution
attacks.text: If you go first, you can use this attack during your first turn. Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.text: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Barrage O'Clock
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Vengeful Crush
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

abilities.name: Sudden Shearing
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Wander About
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Evo-Powder
attacks.text: For each of your Benched Pokémon, search your deck for a card that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Spiral Rush
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

abilities.name: Calming Light
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Asleep.

attacks.name: Rescue Kedge
attacks.text: Put up to 2 Pokémon from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Annihilating Anchor
attacks.text: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leaf Drain
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Jungle Whip

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Triple Draw
attacks.text: Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Counterturn
attacks.text: If there are 3 or fewer cards in your deck, this attack does 200 more damage.

attacks.name: Hazardous Greed
attacks.text: If there are 3 or fewer cards in your deck, this attack also does 120 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Entangling Whip
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Take Down

attacks.name: Fire Soul

attacks.name: Shining Blaze

attacks.name: Singe

attacks.name: Sunny Assist

attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

abilities.text: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. This attack does 40 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Vengeful Crush
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

abilities.name: Sudden Shearing
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Spicy Rage
attacks.text: This attack does 70 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Double Type
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is Grass and Fire type.

attacks.name: Hypno Splash
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: Sparkling Scales
abilities.text: Prevent all damage from and effects of attacks from your opponent's Tera Pokémon done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ice Age
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Dragon Pokémon, it is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Black Frost
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Topaz Bolt
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Resolute Heart
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has full HP and would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, it is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.

attacks.name: Eon Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

abilities.name: Skyliner
abilities.text: Your Basic Pokémon in play have no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Sand Tomb
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Barite Jail
attacks.text: Put damage counters on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon until its remaining HP is 100.

attacks.name: Reversing Storm
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sonic Peridot
attacks.text: This attack does 100 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Crashing Headbutt
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Obsidian
attacks.text: This attack also does 130 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Metal Defender
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

abilities.name: Assemble Alloy
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Basic Metal Energy cards from your discard pile to your Metal Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Tropical Frenzy
attacks.text: You may attach any number of Basic Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Swinging Sphene
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, Knock Out your opponent's Active Basic Pokémon. If tails, Knock Out 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Surprise Pump
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Cinnabar Lure
attacks.text: Look at the top 10 cards of your deck. You may put any number of Pokémon you find there onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Great Swing
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Born to Slack
abilities.text: If your opponent has no Pokémon ex or Pokémon V in play, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Break Through
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Zircon Road
attacks.text: You may draw 5 cards.

attacks.name: Vengeful Crush
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard the top card of your opponent's deck.
